title: Kanban
description: Kanban component displays items grouped by statuses with drag-and-drop reordering and cross-status movement. It supports custom item, header, footer, and empty templates, action icons, tooltips, and emits detailed sorting and mouse events.

sections.title: Action click
sections.description: Enable action icon and handle onActionClick to perform contextual actions.

sections.title: Drag start delay
sections.description: Avoid accidental drags on touch by setting dragStartDelay.

sections.title: Empty state
sections.description: Show a custom template when a status has no items using emptyTemplate.

sections.title: Priority indicator
sections.description: Display item priority using the built-in indicator classes.

sections.title: Tooltips
sections.description: Provide item hints using string or template-based tooltipTemplate.

sections.title: Custom templates
sections.description: Customize headers, footers, content footers, and item rendering using template inputs.

sections.title: Mouse events
sections.description: Handle click, double-click, and right-click events on kanban items.

props.name: hasActions
props.description: Shows an action icon on each item to trigger a contextual action.

props.name: dragStartDelay
props.description: Delay in milliseconds before drag starts after pointer down.

props.name: statuses
props.description: List of board statuses (columns) with key, title and optional index/cssClass.

props.name: itemTemplate
props.description: Optional template to fully customize item rendering. When set, items are rendered from the original data source.

props.name: dataSource
props.description: Items to render in the board. Either typed as AXKanbanItem[] or mapped at runtime using field inputs.

props.name: keyField
props.description: Field name on dataSource objects that uniquely identifies an item.

props.name: indexField
props.description: Field name holding the item's index within its status.

props.name: titleField
props.description: Field name for the item's display title.

props.name: cssClassField
props.description: Field name for custom CSS class applied to the item container.

props.name: priorityField
props.description: Field name indicating item priority which affects indicator color.

props.name: statusKeyField
props.description: Field name pointing to the status key (column) of the item.

props.name: descriptionField
props.description: Field name for the item's subtitle/description.

props.name: emptyTemplate
props.description: Template shown when a status has no items.

props.name: headerTemplate
props.description: Template to customize the status header area.

props.name: footerTemplate
props.description: Template to customize the status footer area.

props.name: contentFooterTemplate
props.description: Template rendered as sticky footer inside the scrollable content area of a status.

props.name: tooltipTemplate
props.description: Text or template used as tooltip for items.

events.name: onSortChanged
events.description: Emitted after an item is dropped to a new index or status with the updated data source.

events.name: onItemClick
events.description: Emitted when an item is clicked.

events.name: onActionClick
events.description: Emitted when the action icon on an item is clicked.

events.name: onItemDblClick
events.description: Emitted when an item is double-clicked.

events.name: onItemRightClick
events.description: Emitted when an item is right-clicked (context menu).

methods.content:
/**
 * Handles a drop operation to reorder items or move them between statuses.
 * It uses the component's current rendered state (`this.items`) as the source
 * of truth, performs precise re-indexing, and emits a comprehensive event with
 * the updated data source.
 *
 * @param event AXDropListDroppedEvent - The drag-and-drop event including indices and container information.
 * @returns void
 */
drop(event: AXDropListDroppedEvent): void
